arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Everton live match updates and team news from Villa Park
arts.sum: Villa are the favourites to claim all three points having stayed unbeaten in all 10 Premier League games versus Everton since returning to the top flight in 2019, winning seven and drawing three. The Toffees, meanwhile, are the third club to lose their opening three Premier League games in consecutive seasons, after Southampton and West Ham United.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Aston Villa: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: We head to Villa Park once more for the Saturday evening kick-off in the Premier League this weekend as Aston Villa take on Everton in the West Midlands. The start of Villa's much-anticipated Champions League campaign is right around the corner, but Unai Emery's side must first navigate a trip to Switzerland to face Young Boys before they can start thinking about duels with Bayern Munich and Juventus.

arts.ttl: Former Aston Villa manager left 'surprised' by Champions League ticket price hike
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa manager Tim Sherwood admits he was surprised by his old club's decision to raise prices so substantially for their forthcoming Champions League campaign. Sherwood only sees Real Madrid and Manchester City as the viable candidates to win the newly formatted Champions League - the two most recent winners - but he considers the way in which the competition is set up might suit Villa, who can ruffle the feathers of some European heavyweights.

arts.ttl: Everton line-ups as Ashley Young and Abdoulaye Doucoure decisions made for Aston Villa
arts.sum: Our writers pick their preferred XIs for the clash in the Midlands on Saturday evening

arts.ttl: Everton make surprising decision on Sean Dyche’s future
arts.sum: It’s not been the best start to the 2024/25 Premier League season for Everton Football Club and Sean Dyche. For a manager that always tries to accentuate the positives, three losses from their opening three games isn’t arguably the way in which the 53-year-old would’ve wanted to begin the campaign. arts.ttl: Aston Villa and West Ham could offer €15m for versatile attacker in January
arts.sum: Besiktas attacker Ernest Muci has been linked with a move away from the club in recent months. The player is reportedly keen on playing in the Premier League and the likes of Aston Villa and West Ham United are following him closely, as per Aksam. They are prepared to come forward with an offer for […] The post Aston Villa and West Ham could offer €15m for versatile attacker in January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Steve Bruce has completed double reunion with former Aston Villa men at Blackpool
arts.sum: Upon exploring the move to Bloomfield Road, he came across sporting director David Downes at Villa - Downes worked in the academy as a talent spotter for a number of years before becoming Villa's head of domestic recruitment in 2018 and following Bruce to Sheffield Wednesday. Bruce is onto his 12th different club in management but has decided, after almost two years out of the game, that he couldn't come permanently away from the game.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton Blasts 'Ridiculous' Everton Fans for Dyche Stance
arts.sum: Chris Sutton has blasted Everton fans ahead of their trip to Aston Villa for their stance on manager Sean Dyche.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa's Premier League squad named with one player missing
arts.sum: As well as naming their squad of senior players - which has a maximum of 25 slots - teams are allowed by the Premier League to submit a supplementary list of under-21s who can also feature but because of their age don't need to be included in the official list. Aston Villa have submitted their full squad to the Premier League for the 2024/25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Emery explains Aston Villa’s Amadou Onana signing as he prepares to face former club Everton
arts.sum: Unai Emery has admitted the ‘gap’ between Amadou Onana’s current ability and potential is ‘bigger’ than he first thought, but backed the Belgian to reach a ‘high’ level. The 23-year-old completed a £50m (per BBC Sport) from Everton this summer and has already scored two goals in three appearances for his new employers — matching […] The post Emery explains Aston Villa’s Amadou Onana signing as he prepares to face former club Everton appeared first on CaughtOffside.
